meaning: 标准的传统键盘;adj.与英文打字机键盘一样的
examples: You can enter text on the QWERTY keyboard or simply write on the screen.
It's a standard virtual QWERTY keyboard.
You can even slap a miniature QWERTY keyboard onto Microsoft 's Xbox 360 controllers.
The software works with a standard Qwerty keyboard, as well as IBM's experimental Atomik keyboard.
